name: ptolomeu
description: macOS menu bar app for searching GitHub repositories, built with Electrobun, React, and Tailwind CSS

scripts.build:native: clang -dynamiclib -framework AppKit -framework Carbon -fobjc-arc -o src/bun/native/liboverlay.dylib src/bun/native/overlay.m -arch arm64
scripts.start: bun run build:native && bun run build:vite && electrobun dev
scripts.dev: bun run build:native && bun run build:vite && electrobun dev --watch
scripts.dev:hmr: bun run build:native && bun run build:vite && concurrently "vite build --watch --mode development" "vite build --config vite.chat.config.ts --watch --mode development" "electrobun dev --watch"
scripts.build:canary: bun run build:native && bun run build:vite && electrobun build --env=canary
scripts.build:release: bun run build:native && bun run build:vite && electrobun build --env=stable
scripts.screenshots: bun run build:native && bun run build:vite && vitest run --config vitest.config.e2e.ts
